strategy.name: VWAP + RSI(7) + EMA(8) Strategy
strategy.description: Three indicators, each doing a different job. EMA(8) for trend direction, VWAP for session bias, RSI(7) for entry timing. All three must align before a trade fires. Runs on 15-minute candles for cleaner signals.

indicators.ema_8: Trend direction. Price above EMA(8) = bullish momentum. Below = bearish.
indicators.vwap: Session bias. Price above VWAP = buyers in control. Below = sellers. Resets at midnight UTC.
indicators.rsi_7: Entry timing. RSI on 7 candles — balanced sensitivity. Below 30 in an uptrend = pullback, snap-back setup. Above 70 in a downtrend = overbought, reversal likely.
indicators.volume: Conviction filter. Current candle volume must exceed 50% of the 20-period average. Uses last completed candle to avoid Binance near-zero reading on forming candles.

long: 1H trend is bullish — higher timeframe confirms direction
Price is above VWAP — buyers in control for the session
Price is above EMA(8) — uptrend confirmed on 15m
RSI(7) has dropped below 30 — pullback in an uptrend, snap-back likely
Price is within 1.5% of VWAP — not overextended
Volume exceeds 50% of 20-period average — move has conviction
short: 1H trend is bearish — higher timeframe confirms direction
Price is below VWAP — sellers in control
Price is below EMA(8) — downtrend confirmed on 15m
RSI(7) has spiked above 70 — overbought in a downtrend, reversal likely
Price is within 1.5% of VWAP — not overextended
Volume exceeds 50% of 20-period average — move has conviction

risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD env var
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY env var
Do not trade if price is more than 1.5% away from VWAP — overextended
No new entries between 20:00–00:00 UTC — low liquidity, unreliable signals
Paper trade first — validate this strategy on your specific asset before going live

changes: RSI long threshold tightened: < 30 → < 25 (require deeper pullback)
RSI short threshold tightened: > 70 → > 80 (require extreme overbought)
Exit changed from dynamic RSI/VWAP-based to fixed percentage TP/SL
Stop loss widened: 0.3% → 0.75% (prior SL exits were within normal 5m noise)
1.5% VWAP distance check formalised as entry condition
tuning_history.rationale: 5 of 6 closed trades hit SL within 0.52-0.61%, just past the 0.5% threshold — within normal 5m noise. Tighter RSI thresholds require stronger setups before entry. Volume filter removes low-conviction moves.

changes: Added 1H trend filter — only trade in direction the 1H EMA(8) confirms
Closed candle fix — all indicators now calculated on last completed candle only
RSI thresholds restored to 30/70 (from 25/80) — 1H filter handles quality, RSI handles timing
tuning_history.rationale: All 5 prior stop losses occurred during counter-trend entries. 1H filter blocks trades that go against the bigger picture. Closed candle fix removes RSI=0/100 false readings from forming candles.

changes: RSI period changed: RSI(3) → RSI(7) — reduces noise, more reliable signals
Timeframe changed: 5m → 15m — reduces random price noise that was triggering stop losses
tuning_history.rationale: RSI(3) on 5m was measuring 15 minutes of data — too sensitive, producing unreliable readings. RSI(7) on 15m measures 105 minutes — far more stable. 15m candles filter out the short-term noise that hit stop losses even when direction was correct.

notes: Runs on 15-minute candles. RSI(7) provides balanced sensitivity — faster than the standard RSI(14) but more reliable than RSI(3). 1H trend filter is the primary quality gate.
